ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Adani Enterprises Limited (AEL) issued a clarification correcting a minor typographical error in the date of a previously submitted media release. The original release regarding an "AdaniDioxycle Partnership" inadvertently stated the date as July 9, 2026, instead of July 10, 2026; however, all other content and the substance of the partnership announcement remain unchanged. This correction is purely administrative, carries no material impact on the company's operations or financials, and presents no significant red flags.
